objective: Validated crates.io publication readiness for grove-core and grove workspace crates against all acceptance criteria.
key_changes: PASS: cli/Cargo.toml contains grove-core = { path = "../core", version = "=0.1.11" }
PASS: cargo publish --dry-run -p grove-core exits 0 with 'aborting upload due to dry run'
PASS: cargo publish --dry-run -p grove correctly fails (proves exact pin is active)
PASS: bump-version.sh step 3/6 updates grove-core version pin atomically
PASS: RELEASING.md step 5 documents cargo publish order (grove-core first, then grove)
PASS: cargo test --release --locked --workspace passes (138 tests, 0 failures)
PASS: Crate name availability (grove, grove-core) confirmed in PLAN.md
